title: Auto Elytra Flight
description: Controls your elytra flight to gain altitude without using fireworks
body:
This is a Forge Port of [Elytra Auto Flight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/elytra-auto-flight) 

When flying with the elytra wings and this mod, you can press the assigned (default "R") key to enable "Auto Flight". The auto-flight will modify your pitch (the up-down direction you are looking) to cycle between going down and gaining speed, and going up and gaining alitude. If you start from a high enough point, you will gain about 10 blocks of altitude per "cycle", and can thus fly for as long as your elytra wings have durability.

Pressing R when not flying with the wings will open the settings screen.
 
When flying, the mod will display a real time graph of your flight profile :   
 ![](https://i.imgur.com/TxsZBmN.png)
